new_classes.label_en: PDO Still Wine in Containers of 2 Litres or Less – CN 22042238
new_classes.label_de: g.U.-Stillwein in Behältnissen bis 2 Liter – KN 22042238
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes with a protected designation of origin (PDO), presented in containers of 2 litres or less, classified under CN subheading 22042238 within the range 22042222–22042278; see additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three main distinguishing criteria shared by the 22042222–22042278 range: (1) still wine (via parent PDOStillWineSmallContainer → StillWine), (2) PDO quality (someValuesFrom ProtectedDesignationOfOrigin), and (3) container size ≤ 2 L (decimalRange maxContainerVolumeL ≤ 2). The code-string hasValue anchors the specific CN leaf node. Coverage is not 1.0 because the legal text references additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22, which defines the precise PDO criteria and may include further sub-discriminating alcoholic-strength bands or other chemical criteria applicable to subheading 22042238 specifically (as opposed to its siblings 22042226, 22042233, 22042274, etc.); those fine-grained intra-range distinctions cannot be determined from the note text provided alone.
